locator.quote: This is independent of the KL explosion

text: The force-close magnitude problem is independent of the KL explosion (rho -0.239, wrong sign): fixing one does not fix the other.
Force-close is sound per pair (bounds naked variance) but its ~182/race aggregate (~-£213/race) flows unoffset into raw reward, so the gradient points to bet-less.

locator.quote: by force-close costs because training ran at fc=0.

text: layq's fc=0 STRONG (+£193/d) dropped to +£26/d at fc=120, with ~£69/day eaten by force-close costs because training ran at fc=0 — the train-vs-deploy fc asymmetry.
